title: Places That Shaped Me
content: I've lived in a lot of places. Japan taught me stillness - how to find joy in a single perfect moment, a tea ceremony, the way light falls. Boston gave me intellectual fire, the thrill of ideas colliding. Ireland showed me that joy lives in storytelling and connection, even on the gray days. Park City reminded me that nature heals what thinking can't fix. And Seattle... Seattle taught me to find beauty in the in-between, the overcast days that most people just endure. Each place left something in me.

teaching_point: Every place teaches you a different way to experience joy
